affiliations.name: HUN-REN KRTK (ANETI Lab) & Corvinus University of Budapest

bio_en: László Lőrincz is a senior researcher at KRTK Institute of Economics (ANETI Lab) and Associate Professor at Corvinus University of Budapest. His research combines economic geography and social-network analysis, examining how contacts shape access to high-opportunity places and labor-market outcomes. His work has appeared in the Journal of Economic Geography.
